channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Haitians Stuck in Mexico Find Some Comfort Despite Broken Asylum Systems
item.description: A year ago, when Jean Baptiste Gensley stepped off a bus in Tapachula, Mexico’s southern city on the border with Guatemala, he carried a small backpack and the hope that his journey was finally over. In his native Haiti, Gensley, 37, had worked as a radio journalist and social worker, analyzing the effects of gang violence in some ... Read more
